name: Certificate-Based Auth Anomaly
description: Investigates anomalies in certificate-based authentication including expired certificates, certificate chain validation failures, and certificates used from unexpected locations. Verifies the certificate chain, analyzes the anomaly with AI, revokes compromised certificates, and alerts the PKI team for investigation.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Query certificate-based authentication logs and user certificate mappings

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create investigation ticket for PKI team

data.title: Certificate Auth Anomaly Alert
data.summary: Fires on certificate-based authentication anomaly or validation failure

data.title: Verify Certificate Chain
data.summary: Validate the certificate chain and check expiration, revocation status, and issuer

config.code:
cert = context['trigger']['alert'].get('certificate', {})
chain_valid = cert.get('chain_valid', False)
is_expired = cert.get('is_expired', False)
is_revoked = cert.get('is_revoked', False)
issuer_trusted = cert.get('issuer_trusted', True)
result = {'chain_valid': chain_valid, 'is_expired': is_expired, 'is_revoked': is_revoked, 'issuer_trusted': issuer_trusted, 'cert_subject': cert.get('subject', ''), 'cert_serial': cert.get('serial_number', ''), 'is_compromised': not chain_valid or is_revoked or not issuer_trusted}

data.title: AI Certificate Anomaly Analysis
data.summary: Analyze the certificate anomaly context and usage patterns

data.title: Certificate Compromised?
data.summary: Branch if the certificate chain is invalid, revoked, or from untrusted issuer

data.title: Revoke Certificate
data.summary: Add the compromised certificate to the revocation list

params.reason: Certificate anomaly — chain validation failure or untrusted issuer

data.title: Create PKI Investigation Ticket
data.summary: Create Jira ticket for PKI team to investigate the certificate anomaly

config.title: Certificate Auth Anomaly: {{$.nodes.ca-2.result.cert_subject}} — Compromised Certificate
config.description: Certificate-based authentication anomaly detected. Subject: {{$.nodes.ca-2.result.cert_subject}}. Serial: {{$.nodes.ca-2.result.cert_serial}}. Chain valid: {{$.nodes.ca-2.result.chain_valid}}. Issuer trusted: {{$.nodes.ca-2.result.issuer_trusted}}. Certificate has been revoked. PKI team investigation required.

data.title: Alert PKI Team
data.summary: Notify the PKI team of the compromised certificate

config.message: Certificate auth anomaly detected. Subject: {{$.nodes.ca-2.result.cert_subject}}. Certificate revoked. Chain valid: {{$.nodes.ca-2.result.chain_valid}}, Issuer trusted: {{$.nodes.ca-2.result.issuer_trusted}}. Investigation ticket created.

data.title: Log Anomaly for Review
data.summary: Log the certificate anomaly as informational for monitoring

config.note: Certificate auth anomaly detected but certificate chain is valid and issuer is trusted. Logged for monitoring. Possible causes: unusual location, time-based anomaly.
